title: Another. (Abel's Blood)
content:
The blood of Abel was a thing
    Of such a rev'rend reckoning,
    As that the old world thought it fit
    Especially to swear by it.
meaning:
"Another. (Abel's Blood)" is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
